fields.title: Fix lint warnings: unused imports and no-useless-fallback-in-spread
fields.description: 11 lint warnings: 2 unused SandboxConfig type imports (agent/services.ts, agent/worker.ts), 1 unused countOverlappingAgents function, and useless ?? {} fallback spreads in prompt/modes.ts, services/prompt-modes.ts, sandbox/config.ts, sandbox/index.ts.
fields.close_reason: Removed 2 unused SandboxConfig imports, removed dead countOverlappingAgents + listPiProcesses + helpers chain, fixed 7 useless ?? {} fallback spreads. Down from 11 lint warnings to 1 (intentional ANSI escape regex).
